body:
## Summary
- Improved landing page responsiveness for smaller laptop screens.
- Adjusted Navbar scaling on smaller screens.
- Refined Hero card/ghost alignment.
- Reduced oversized panel scaling on Skills and PvE slides.

## Test
- Ran frontend build successfully:
```bash
npm run build

## 中文说明
- 优化了 landing page 在小尺寸笔记本屏幕上的响应式显示效果。
- 调整了小屏幕下 Navbar 的整体缩放比例。
- 修正了第一屏 Hero 卡牌与后方剪影的对齐效果。
- 缩小了 Skills 和 PvE 页面中过大的中间展示面板，使其在小屏幕下更协调。

reviews.body: The changes are minor and clean; the approach of using CSS variables to standardise the navbar height is sensible, and there are no conflicts with other pull requests.

title: Fix/landing responsive
